# Legal & Compliance — Prompts

Prompt collection for **Legal & Compliance**.

| Title | App | Use Case | Difficulty |
| ----- | --- | -------- | ---------- |
| [Architecture Decision Research](../../_canonical/architecture-decision-research.md) | Cross-App | Research architecture decisions from discussions. Always verify current state with architecture team. | intermediate |
| [CAB Meeting Preparation](../../_canonical/cab-meeting-preparation.md) | Cross-App | Prepare for CAB meetings with context on pending changes and concerns. | intermediate |
| [Change Request Preparation](../../_canonical/change-request-preparation.md) | Cross-App | Research previous change implementations to prepare comprehensive change requests. | intermediate |
| [Claim Timeline Summary](../../_canonical/claim-timeline-summary.md) | Cross-App | Organize claim timeline from correspondence. Legal analysis requires qualified legal review. | intermediate |
| [Compliance Correspondence Review](../../_canonical/compliance-correspondence-review.md) | Cross-App | Research compliance discussions. Compliance determinations require formal compliance review. | intermediate |
| [Contract Pattern Research](../../_canonical/contract-pattern-research.md) | Cross-App | Research contract patterns across deals. Legal applicability requires formal legal review. | intermediate |
| [Dispute Preparation](../../_canonical/dispute-preparation.md) | Cross-App | Prepare for dispute meetings with context from correspondence. Legal strategy requires legal counsel. | intermediate |
| [Environmental Compliance Research](../../_canonical/environmental-compliance-research.md) | Cross-App | Research environmental compliance discussions. Actual compliance activities use formal environmental systems. | intermediate |
| [HSE Meeting Preparation](../../_canonical/hse-meeting-preparation.md) | Cross-App | Prepare for HSE meetings with context from communications. Formal HSE metrics come from HSE systems. | intermediate |
| [HSE Procedure Search](../../_canonical/hse-procedure-search.md) | Cross-App | Quickly locate HSE procedures. ALWAYS verify revision status with Document Control before field use. | intermediate |
| [HSE Trend Identification](../../_canonical/hse-trend-identification.md) | Cross-App | Explore HSE themes from communications. Formal trend analysis must use HSE incident systems. | intermediate |
| [Incident Context Research](../../_canonical/incident-context-research.md) | Cross-App | Gather context on incident discussions. Formal incident data and investigation must use official HSE systems. | intermediate |
| [Incident History Search](../../_canonical/incident-history-search.md) | Cross-App | Research previous incident resolutions to inform current troubleshooting. | intermediate |
| [Negotiation History Research](../../_canonical/negotiation-history-research.md) | Cross-App | Research contract negotiation history for preparation. Legal analysis requires qualified legal review. | intermediate |
| [Precedent Search](../../_canonical/precedent-search.md) | Cross-App | Find contract precedents for reference. Legal applicability requires qualified legal assessment. | intermediate |
| [Quality Audit Preparation](../../_canonical/quality-audit-preparation.md) | Cross-App | Prepare for quality audits with context from communications. Formal quality data comes from QMS. | intermediate |
| [Technical Documentation Search](../../_canonical/technical-documentation-search.md) | Cross-App | Locate technical documentation and assess currency. Always verify documentation is current before use. | intermediate |
| [Vendor Support Summary](../../_canonical/vendor-support-summary.md) | Cross-App | Compile vendor support history to prepare for escalations. | intermediate |
